summary: This role is a poor fit because its heavy reliance on high-stakes analytical reasoning and real-time pattern recognition directly conflicts with your preference for procedural, protocol-driven work. The high stress levels and significant burnout risk, driven by emotional intensity and physical strain, are incompatible with your focus on personal wellbeing and a sustainable career. Furthermore, the frequent requirement for unpredictable on-call shifts and 24/7 hospital coverage makes achieving the predictable schedule you prioritize nearly impossible.
